sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102826" key="teixomelh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τειχομελής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n102826.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">walling by music</tr_>, of Amphion's lyre, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.216</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Honest.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
